items.original_title: Google’s SensorFM turns messy wearable sensor data into a general-purpose health intelligence layer
items.title_en: Google’s SensorFM turns messy wearable sensor data into a general-purpose health intelligence layer
items.summary_en: Google Research's SensorFM is a foundation model trained on more than a trillion minutes of wearable data from five million Fitbit and Pixel Watch users. It beats existing benchmarks on 34 of 35 health and behavioral tasks. SensorFM could eventually power Google's AI health coach, but the company hasn't announced any…
items.title_zh: 谷歌推出SensorFM健康智能模型
items.summary_zh: 谷歌推出新模型SensorFM，能够将穿戴设备数据转化为通用健康智能层，表现超过现有基准。这一模型将对未来的AI健康教练产生重要影响。

items.original_title: Anthropic extends free Fable 5 access for subscribers as OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol heats up the pricing war
items.title_en: Anthropic extends free Fable 5 access for subscribers as OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol heats up the pricing war
items.summary_en: Anthropic is keeping Claude Fable 5 in its subscription plans through July 19, 2026. The model was supposed to switch to pay-per-use today. Subscribers can use up to 50 percent of their weekly limit for Fable 5. The extension is likely a response to pricing pressure from OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol and cheaper competing mode…
items.title_zh: Anthropic延长Claude Fable 5免费使用期应对价格竞争
items.summary_zh: Anthropic延长了Claude Fable 5的免费使用期限，回应了OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol带来的价格竞争压力。这一策略可能影响未来的AI定价环境。

items.original_title: OpenAI's new prompting guide tells users to stop overthinking and start with the result
items.title_en: OpenAI's new prompting guide tells users to stop overthinking and start with the result
items.summary_en: OpenAI has released a prompting guide for everyday users, not developers. Instead of rigid formulas, it suggests four optional building blocks: goal, context, format, and constraints. The core advice is simple: describe the result you want, not the steps to get there. It's the first time OpenAI covers both Chat and Co…
items.title_zh: OpenAI发布用户友好的提示指南
items.summary_zh: OpenAI发布新的提示指南，鼓励用户专注于结果而非过程，旨在帮助用户更高效地与AI进行互动。该框架首次整合了Chat与Codex的使用方式。

items.original_title: LinkedIn is the undisputed king of long-form AI slop, according to a study spanning five platforms
items.title_en: LinkedIn is the undisputed king of long-form AI slop, according to a study spanning five platforms
items.summary_en: One in four longer social media posts is entirely AI-generated, according to a Pangram analysis. LinkedIn leads with 41 percent of long-form posts flagged as AI-written. The platform made up only a third of all posts scanned but accounted for nearly two-thirds of all detected AI content. Because the detection model te…
items.title_zh: 研究显示LinkedIn是AI生成内容的主要平台
items.summary_zh: 研究显示，LinkedIn是AI生成长文的重灾区，相当于四分之一的长文内容完全由AI生成。这反映了社交媒体平台上AI内容生成的普遍性。

items.summary_en: Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software development. GitHub: 698 stars, 148 forks.
items.title_zh: 推出新的自主软件开发环境
items.summary_zh: 新推出的控制环境有助于实现验证自主软件开发，并支持无暴露的代理操作。这为软件开发领域带来了新的工具和思路。

items.summary_en: DiffusionGemma Director Assistant nodes for ComfyUI LTX workflows GitHub: 19 stars, 2 forks.
items.summary_zh: ComfyUI发布新的DiffusionGemmaPromptBuilder，支持LTX工作流，为生成内容提供新的工具。

items.title_zh: Homekit项目让AI代理支持智能家居控制
items.summary_zh: 新推出的Homekit项目允许任何AI代理直接控制Apple Home设备，为智能家居的AI集成提供了新的可能性。
